commands.review_summary:
Adds a Matrix crypto-runtime helper that wraps fake-indexeddb transactions, prunes finished transactions for Matrix rust-crypto database suffixes, and covers the behavior with focused tests.

PR surface: Source +122, Tests +126. Total +248 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source/proof level: current main routes Matrix E2EE through fake-indexeddb 6.2.5, the dependency source retains finished transactions, and the PR body includes after-fix Node output. I did not run the long-lived live Matrix sync/OOM loop in this read-only review.
